scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:ts && pnpm run lint:rust
scripts.lint:ts: pnpm -C photo-verifier exec eslint . && pnpm -C demo-site run lint && pnpm -C packages/core run lint && pnpm -C packages/blockchain run lint && pnpm -C packages/photoverifier-sdk run lint && pnpm -C packages/photoverifier-seeker-sdk run lint
